sections.paragraph:
ὕψος, ους, τό [ὕψι ‘high up’]

—1. ‘extent or distance that is upward’, height

—a. w. focus on dimension height, of a city Rv 21:16; in imagery Eph 3:18.

—b. w. focus on position Eph 4:8; ἐξ ὕψους from on high Lk 1:78; 24:49.

—2. ‘position at a relatively high point in status’, in pass. sense w. connotation of experience of divine action exaltation, elevation Js 1:9.
